evals.prompt: Deploy the latest changes to the production app at app.freyaivisions.de.
evals.expected_output: Pre-deploy checklist executed (git status clean, correct branch, pushed to GitHub), current commit SHA captured for rollback, deploy command run via SSH, post-deploy HTTP/SSL/SW verification performed

assertions.name: pre-deploy-checklist
assertions.description: Must verify git status is clean and changes are pushed to GitHub before deploying

assertions.name: capture-rollback-sha
assertions.description: Must capture the current commit SHA on VPS before running git reset --hard

assertions.name: correct-deploy-command
assertions.description: Must use: ssh root@72.61.187.24 with cd to /home/openclaw/workspace/projects/freyai-app && git fetch github main && git reset --hard github/main

assertions.name: post-deploy-verification
assertions.description: Must run HTTP status check and content verification against app.freyaivisions.de after deploy

assertions.name: user-confirmation
assertions.description: Must confirm the deploy target (prod) with the user before executing

evals.prompt: Set up SSL for the new subdomain api.freyaivisions.de pointing to our VPS.
evals.expected_output: DNS A record reminder, certbot command with --nginx flag for the subdomain, nginx config test and reload, SSL verification via curl

assertions.name: dns-prerequisite
assertions.description: Must mention that a DNS A record for api.freyaivisions.de pointing to 72.61.187.24 is required first

assertions.name: certbot-command
assertions.description: Must use: certbot --nginx -d api.freyaivisions.de on the VPS

assertions.name: nginx-reload
assertions.description: Must test nginx config (nginx -t) and reload after changes

assertions.name: ssl-verification
assertions.description: Must verify SSL is working after setup with a curl or similar check

evals.prompt: The latest production deploy broke the app. Roll back to the previous version immediately.
evals.expected_output: List recent commits on VPS to identify the previous good commit, reset to that commit, run post-deploy verification to confirm the rollback worked

assertions.name: identify-previous-commit
assertions.description: Must list recent commits on the VPS with git log to find the previous good commit SHA

assertions.name: rollback-command
assertions.description: Must use git reset --hard <commit-sha> on the correct VPS path

assertions.name: post-rollback-verification
assertions.description: Must verify the app is working after rollback with HTTP/content checks

assertions.name: no-force-push
assertions.description: Must not attempt any git push or force push on the VPS
